mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-2A-R2 — Provider Serialization Validation Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
support={"Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_CONTRACT_V1.json": [3841, "6f59b18094283cacd4d1911e79bf8ff102cd4fc7f16d280f695b81777907766b"], "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_QUERY_FIXTURES_V1.json": [2650, "bdc1f3fd032952e2eb3946844e3861527f6b86a58d3f56d07e569507e3bac72a"], "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py": [48584, "41a1663cd30af8a3800c8082d351f8d0338e75cd1df39d3c801a39cc3075f680"]}
for name,(size,digest) in support.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes()
 assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data),size)
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
compile(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b2a-provider>","exec")
unchanged={"Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py": "74c42992fac82d71846c40ac8d0fb776ace93a4a6bb4202e492a0fd56a8662c7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py": "96edd665af8eea2aca3563074f0e894607b03b53c22ac13d36cddc0bd58460f1", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py": "ad501eff2f8162a319085aa4eb6368039e9757e89ee4eaccb11e5f6e446ca6a7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py": "a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b", "Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py": "d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952", "Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py": "a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"}
for name,digest in unchanged.items():
 assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
expected={"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json": "1688a1a1a90f7925c361996eef6211476d133280307416e5a84e68a3ca07b71f", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_REPORT.md": "6473cc6b7ef328e095348e4ad8813df53e31e061c21f1f5cff6e9993d18c95b7", "CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json": "3dc50e04a634a73c67b963ea3ee10fdb52d1bac126bac26cb22f544f92288fba", "FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json": "8673d496b81aebe432b4f79df7d1b773aea8742f0b09ebfe6d660a9f170f9c3f", "RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json": "40462031e89ea469b7c3940c863d225fa7fbad2cef4c6f44e720154d42cf4c86"}
for name,digest in expected.items():
 assert hashlib.sha256((source/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=manifest["entries"]
expected_paths=[
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_CONTRACT_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_QUERY_FIXTURES_V1.json",
 "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/resource_evidence_provider_v1.py",
]
normalized=sorted(row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert len(entries)==3 and normalized==expected_paths,(normalized,expected_paths)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_SUPPORT_SOURCES_COMPATIBILITY_AND_SNAPSHOT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1B-2A support payloads, authoritative sources, compatibility hashes, and normalized snapshot

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout)
assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==3 and obj["authoritative_source_count"]==5
assert obj["supported_category_count"]==18 and obj["fixture_classification_count"]==10
assert obj["slash_bypass_before_evidence_loading"] is True
assert obj["unrelated_query_rejected_before_evidence_loading"] is True
assert obj["answer_packet_envelope_compatible"] is True
assert obj["current_state_claimed"] is False and obj["live_scan_design"] is False
assert obj["network_used"] is False and obj["model_used"] is False
assert obj["diagnosis_issued"] is False and obj["recommendations_issued"] is False
assert obj["k_path_excluded"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))
validations.name: Run isolated V1B-2A resource provider self-test
validations.stdout: {"answer_packet_envelope_compatible": true, "authoritative_source_count": 5, "canonical_lf_only": true, "current_state_claimed": false, "diagnosis_issued": false, "fixture_classification_count": 10, "k_path_excluded": true, "live_scan_design": false, "model_used": false, "network_used": false, "output_count": 3, "recommendations_issued": false, "slash_bypass_before_evidence_loading": true, "stable_ids": true, "status": "ok", "supported_category_count": 18, "unrelated_query_rejected_before_evidence_loading": true}

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER")
expected=["RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_REGISTRY.json", "RESOURCE_QUERY_FIXTURE_RESULTS.json", "RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_RECEIPT.json"]
files=sorted(p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())
assert files==sorted(expected),(files,expected)
for name in expected:
 data=(out/name).read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data,name
 obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8"))
 canonical=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
 assert data==canonical,name
assert sum((out/name).stat().st_size for name in expected)<2*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_EXACT_THREE_UTF8_LF_OUTPUTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate exactly three deterministic UTF-8 LF-only provider outputs

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER")
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE")
expected={"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json": "1688a1a1a90f7925c361996eef6211476d133280307416e5a84e68a3ca07b71f", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_REPORT.md": "6473cc6b7ef328e095348e4ad8813df53e31e061c21f1f5cff6e9993d18c95b7", "CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json": "3dc50e04a634a73c67b963ea3ee10fdb52d1bac126bac26cb22f544f92288fba", "FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json": "8673d496b81aebe432b4f79df7d1b773aea8742f0b09ebfe6d660a9f170f9c3f", "RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json": "40462031e89ea469b7c3940c863d225fa7fbad2cef4c6f44e720154d42cf4c86"}
for name,digest in expected.items():
 assert hashlib.sha256((source/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
source_receipt=json.loads((source/"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert source_receipt["status"]=="compared_and_verified"
assert source_receipt["authoritative_inputs_verified"] is True and source_receipt["output_count"]==5
registry=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_REGISTRY.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert registry["status"]=="registered_offline_provider"
assert registry["supported_category_count"]==18
assert len(registry["authoritative_source_files"])==5
assert registry["answer_packet_compatibility"]["base_schema"]=="foxai.agent_fox.technical_core.v1a3e.answer_packet.v1"
assert registry["answer_packet_compatibility"]["shared_contract_modified"] is False
assert registry["routing"]["slash_command_bypass_before_evidence_loading"] is True
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_FIVE_SOURCES_RECEIPT_AND_REGISTRY_OK")
validations.name: Validate all five authoritative sources, V1B-1C receipt, and provider registry

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import importlib.util,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER")
results=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_QUERY_FIXTURE_RESULTS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert results["status"]=="fixtures_passed" and results["fixture_count"]==10
assert results["resource_answer_count"]==8 and results["not_applicable_count"]==1 and results["slash_bypass_count"]==1
rows={row["fixture_id"]:row for row in results["rows"]}
expected={"FIXTURE-01":"measured_normal_loaded_ram","FIXTURE-02":"dominant_measured_foxai_component","FIXTURE-03":"available_loaded_state_memory","FIXTURE-04":"current_page_file_usage","FIXTURE-05":"idle_comfyui_working_set","FIXTURE-06":"active_image_generation_capacity_limitation","FIXTURE-07":"foxai_process_count_delta","FIXTURE-08":"listener_presence_captured_states"}
for fid,category in expected.items():
 row=rows[fid]; assert row["actual_status"]=="answered" and row["actual_category"]==category
 packet=row["answer_packet"]; assert packet["status"]=="answered" and packet["provider"]=="resource_evidence_provider_v1"
 assert packet["current_state_claimed"] is False and packet["live_scan_performed"] is False
 assert packet["source_files"] and packet["source_record_ids"]
assert rows["FIXTURE-01"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["physical_memory_in_use_bytes"]==42833985536
assert rows["FIXTURE-02"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["model_working_set_bytes"]==29876736000
assert rows["FIXTURE-03"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["available_physical_memory_bytes"]==8379232256
assert rows["FIXTURE-04"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["loaded_capture_page_file_current_usage_mib"]==693
assert rows["FIXTURE-04"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["historical_peak_usage_mib"]==8191
assert rows["FIXTURE-05"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["idle_comfyui_working_set_bytes"]==567324672
assert rows["FIXTURE-07"]["answer_packet"]["derived_values"]["foxai_process_count_delta"]==3
assert rows["FIXTURE-08"]["answer_packet"]["observed_values"]["8080"]=={"minimal_load_present":False,"normal_loaded_present":True}
assert rows["FIXTURE-09"]["actual_status"]=="not_applicable" and rows["FIXTURE-09"]["evidence_loaded"] is False
assert rows["FIXTURE-10"]["actual_status"]=="bypass" and rows["FIXTURE-10"]["evidence_loaded"] is False
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("v1b2a_validation",p); mod=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod)
mod._configure_source_dir_for_tests(Path(r"Q:\definitely_missing")); mod._reset_audit_for_tests()
slash=mod.answer_question("   /engineer workshop begin test","VALIDATE-SLASH")
assert slash["status"]=="bypass" and slash["evidence_loaded"] is False and mod.audit_snapshot()["source_file_reads"]==0
joke=mod.answer_question("Tell me a joke.","VALIDATE-JOKE")
assert joke["status"]=="not_applicable" and joke["evidence_loaded"] is False and mod.audit_snapshot()["source_file_reads"]==0
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_FIXTURES_GROUNDED_VALUES_AND_PRELOAD_BYPASS_OK")
validations.name: Validate fixture classifications, exact grounded values, and slash bypass before evidence loading

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER")
payload=b"\\n".join(p.read_bytes() for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()).lower()
for token in (b"c:\\\\users\\\\",b'"commandline"',b'"environment_values"',b'"api_key"',b'"token_value"',b'"cookie"',b'"credential"',b'"product_key"',b'"mac_address"',b'"drive_serial"',b"k:\\\\",b"k:/"):
 assert token not in payload,token
script=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\resource_evidence_provider_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8").lower()
for token in ("import subprocess","import socket","import psutil","import winreg","import requests","get-ciminstance","get-nettcpconnection","urllib.request"):
 assert token not in script,token
for forbidden in ("the pc is healthy","the pc is unhealthy","computer is broken","computer is infected","buy more ram","replace the model","change the page file","disable services"):
 assert forbidden.encode("utf-8") not in payload,forbidden
receipt=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for key in ("authoritative_sources_verified","slash_bypass_before_evidence_loading","unrelated_query_rejection_verified","exact_grounded_values_verified","answer_packet_envelope_compatible","deterministic_utf8_lf_serialization"):
 assert receipt[key] is True,key
for key in ("current_state_claimed","live_scan_performed","live_process_inspection_performed","live_listener_inspection_performed","filesystem_search_performed","network_connections_initiated","model_calls_performed","gui_started","automatic_process_changes_performed","services_changed","startup_items_changed","registry_writes","live_foxai_application_modules_imported","diagnosis_issued","recommendations_issued","rollback_drive_k_accessed"):
 assert receipt[key] is False,key
unchanged={"Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\pc_resource_baseline_comparison_v1.py": "74c42992fac82d71846c40ac8d0fb776ace93a4a6bb4202e492a0fd56a8662c7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\protected_context_registry_query_bridge_v1.py": "96edd665af8eea2aca3563074f0e894607b03b53c22ac13d36cddc0bd58460f1", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\provenance_self_knowledge_answer_packet_bridge_v1.py": "ad501eff2f8162a319085aa4eb6368039e9757e89ee4eaccb11e5f6e446ca6a7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py": "a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7", "Z:\\FOXAI\\System\\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py": "765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b", "Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py": "d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952", "Z:\\FOXAI\\ui\\main_window.py": "a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_PRIVACY_OFFLINE_NO_RECOMMENDATIONS_AND_INTEGRATIONS_OK")

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7_V1B2A_R2_RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER")
receipt=json.loads((out/"RESOURCE_EVIDENCE_PROVIDER_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt["status"]=="provider_built_and_verified" and receipt["mission_id"]=="ENG-20260722-153014-F39AF7"
assert receipt["output_count"]==3 and receipt["authoritative_source_count"]==5
assert len(receipt["outputs_before_receipt"])==2
for row in receipt["outputs_before_receipt"]:
 data=(out/row["name"]).read_bytes(); assert len(data)==row["size_bytes"]
 assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==row["sha256"]
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-142022-9FAE11_V1B1C_BASELINE_COMPARISON_AND_CAPACITY_GUIDANCE"); expected={"BASELINE_COMPARISON_RECEIPT.json": "1688a1a1a90f7925c361996eef6211476d133280307416e5a84e68a3ca07b71f", "BASELINE_COMPARISON_REPORT.md": "6473cc6b7ef328e095348e4ad8813df53e31e061c21f1f5cff6e9993d18c95b7", "CAPACITY_HEADROOM_OBSERVATIONS.json": "3dc50e04a634a73c67b963ea3ee10fdb52d1bac126bac26cb22f544f92288fba", "FOXAI_COMPONENT_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTION.json": "8673d496b81aebe432b4f79df7d1b773aea8742f0b09ebfe6d660a9f170f9c3f", "RESOURCE_BASELINE_COMPARISON.json": "40462031e89ea469b7c3940c863d225fa7fbad2cef4c6f44e720154d42cf4c86"}
for name,digest in expected.items(): assert hashlib.sha256((source/name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())<2*1024*1024
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B2A_RECEIPT_SOURCE_PRESERVATION_AND_SIZE_OK")
validations.name: Validate provider receipt, authoritative source preservation, and output-size ceiling
